channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Corporate Media Give Trans Hockey Game Shooter The ‘Gunperson’ Treatment
item.description: Details of Dorgan's trans identity have been deemed unpublishable by corporate media outlets which refuse to call him a man.

item.title: Exclusive: New York Times Hit Piece On ICE Facilities’ Medical Care Is Riddled With Falsehoods, DHS Says
item.description: 'These allegations of illegal aliens being denied proper medical care in ICE custody are FALSE,' Dr. Sean Conley, DHS chief medical officer, told The ...

item.title: AOC’s Risible Performance
item.description: AOC’s time at the Munich conference was another reminder that no matter how much she is billed as a rising star, she is still callow and unserious.

item.title: Congress Should Close the Big Hospitals Tax Loophole
item.description: Large nonprofit hospital networks are leveraging huge subsidies for financial gains and political advantage.

item.title: Minnesota's Legislature braces for a federal immigration fight as the enforcement surge winds down
item.description: Democrats hope to rein in the power of federal immigration officers in Minnesota as the state's legislative session gets underway Tuesday, while Repub...

item.title: From deportation to court, key events in Kilmar Abrego Garcia's fight with the Trump administration
item.description: Kilmar Abrego Garcia entered the news in March 2025 after he was deported to El Salvador despite a court ruling that should have prevented it. His com...

item.title: Two More Trans Killers Carry Out Atrocities
item.description: There are dots here that should be connected.

item.title: Rubio’s Impressive Tightrope Walk
item.description: The secretary of state stayed true to President Trump while reassuring Europe.

item.title: 'I support all three': Trump declines to endorse one Texas GOP Senate candidate
item.description: President Trump has not decided which GOP candidate to endorse ahead of the contentious Republican Senate primary in Texas, instead opting to favor al...

item.title: Conservative Law Firm Picks Up Dobbs Litigator To Fuel More Supreme Court Victories
item.description: A key member of the legal team that convinced the Supreme Court to overrule Roe v. Wade has joined a new law firm to pursue a broader range of appella...

item.title: Attacking America Abroad, Hillary Clinton Is The Eileen Gu Of Politics
item.description: Hillary was the vessel into which Europeans could pour their refusal to accept American political change.

item.title: Trump administration is erasing history and science at national parks, lawsuit argues
item.description: Conservation and historical organizations sued the Trump administration on Tuesday over National Park Service policies that the groups say erase histo...

item.title: Judge blocks ICE from rearresting Kilmar Abrego Garcia for 'foreseeable future'
item.description: A federal judge ruled Tuesday that the Trump administration has been playing games with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and issued a new order barring ICE from ...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Says Mass Migration Went ‘Too Far’ But Here’s How You Can Tell She Doesn’t Mean It
item.description: Only when elections are at stake do Democrats pretend to notice the consequences of mass migration.

item.title: America Seeks Partner, Europe Swipes Left
item.description: There is a kind of romantic streak to U.S. relations with Europe in the Trump era.
